description: Property listing descriptions for MLS, Zillow, and agency sites

slots.hint: What type of listing — sale, rent, commercial, luxury?
Who is the target buyer or renter?
Top 3-5 features that make this property stand out?
Word count limit, compliance restrictions, brand guidelines?
Where will this listing appear — MLS, Zillow, agency site, social?
Which AI model will run this prompt?
